# body2TextProvider

**Instance Property**

An optional second line of body text.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var body2TextProvider: CLKTextProvider? { get set }
```

## Discussion

If you don’t specify a value for this property, the text in the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationTemplateModularLargeStandardBody/body1TextProvider] property wraps and is displayed on the second line.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **headerImageProvider**: An optional image to display in the header.
- **headerTextProvider**: The text to display in the header line.
- **body1TextProvider**: The top line of body text.
